rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core constructs: both are in automotive repurchase/loyalty settings, and the citing study explicitly includes customer satisfaction and demographic effects on loyalty while the cited study models how satisfaction and demographics map to actual repurchase behavior. This overlap suggests the citation could be a mechanism/theory or empirical benchmark source rather than a purely incidental mention. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text context, it is still safer to retain for full relation judgment than drop.
